title: lactuca serriola f. serriola
intro: Lactuca serriola f. serriola, also known as prickly lettuce or wild opium lettuce, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its sedative, analgesic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lactuca serriola f. serriola include its ability to reduce anxiety and promote a good night's sleep, as well as its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Lactuca serriola f. serriola can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote relaxation and reduce pain.
